enum/Enum/value.name: value
enum/Enum/value.description: The value given to the Enum member: >>> Color.RED.value 1 Value of the member, can be set in __new__(). Note Enum member values Member values can be anything: int, str, etc. If the exact value is unimportant you may use auto instances and an appropriate value will be chosen for you. See auto for the details. While mutable/unhashable values, such as dict, list or a mutable dataclass, can be used, they will have a quadratic performance impact during creation relative to the total number of muta...

enum/verify.name: verify
enum/verify.description: A class decorator specifically for enumerations. Members from EnumCheck are used to specify which constraints should be checked on the decorated enumeration. Added in version 3.11.
